untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (higher timeframe vs lower timeframe structural patterns, ABC pullback structures, and HTF resistance proximity tracking). Current engine supports single-timeframe indicators only. HTF breakout confirmation, HTF bullish pattern detection (flag/triangle), and comparative timeframe analysis cannot be expressed with available single-timeframe indicators. Parameters htf_lookback_bars, ltf_trend_confirmation_bars, and max_bars_since_htf_breakout require multi-timeframe capability not available.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using Donchian breakouts (dc_upper/dc_lower) for trend breakouts and ADX for trend confirmation. Used pivot levels (r1/s1) as proxies for HTF resistance. Used body comparison for reversal detection. However, this translation fundamentally misses the core multi-timeframe synchronization logic that defines this signal. Backtest results would not accurately reflect the original signal intent.
